parsedJson.summary: The website uses a dated layout with a cluttered header and a hero section that relies on a generic stock photo, making the business feel less professional than it likely is.

issues.title: Header is too busy and distracts from the phone number
issues.what_observed: The top navigation bar contains 8 distinct menu items (Home, About Us, Our Services, etc.) plus social icons, a search icon, and contact details, all crammed into a single horizontal strip.
issues.why_problem: A visitor looking for a roofing quote is overwhelmed by choices. The phone number is buried in the top strip rather than being a primary call-to-action. The sheer number of links suggests a lack of focus on the main goal: getting a quote.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simplified header with a logo on the left, a 'Get a Quote' button on the right, and a hamburger menu for secondary links. The phone number should be prominent and clickable.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce navigation items to 3-4 key categories. Move the phone number to a sticky header or make it a large button. Remove social icons from the main nav to reduce visual noise.
issues.plain_explanation: 网页顶部的导航栏太乱了，塞进了太多链接和图标。这让访客不知道该看哪里，甚至找不到电话号码。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在几秒钟内就会感到困惑并离开。如果找不到联系方式，他们就会直接去竞争对手的网站。这可能导致高达 30% 的潜在客户流失。

issues.title: Hero image uses a generic stock photo instead of real work
issues.what_observed: The main banner image features a smiling family pointing upwards in a generic room, overlaid with a blue tint and text. It does not show any actual roof renovations or the company's work.
issues.why_problem: Customers searching for 'roofing Brisbane' want to see proof of capability. A stock photo feels impersonal and untrustworthy. It doesn't demonstrate the specific service (attic renovation) effectively.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photo of a real, completed attic renovation project by the company, showing the 'before and after' or the finished space. Alternatively, a photo of the team at work.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the stock photo with a real project image. Use a split-screen 'before/after' slider or a high-res photo of a finished attic space with the headline overlaid clearly.
issues.plain_explanation: 主页的大图是一张通用的家庭照片，而不是你们实际做的屋顶改造案例。这让访客觉得你们不够专业，或者没有真实的作品展示。
issues.customer_impact: 信任感是本地服务业务的关键。使用真实案例图片可以将转化率提高 20-40%，因为客户能看到实际效果，而不是想象。

issues.title: Primary call-to-action button is buried and low contrast
issues.what_observed: The 'Get in touch for a free quote!' button is yellow, placed at the bottom of the hero section, and requires scrolling to see fully on mobile. It is not the most prominent element.
issues.why_problem: The main goal is to get a quote. The button is not immediately visible or compelling. On mobile, users might not scroll down to find it. The yellow color blends with the text and doesn't stand out enough against the blue background.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A large, high-contrast button (e.g., bright orange or white with dark text) placed above the fold, directly under the main headline. It should say 'Get Your Free Quote' or 'Call Now'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move the CTA button to be immediately visible under the headline. Increase its size and contrast. Add a secondary CTA like 'Call 07 3889 6688' for immediate contact.
issues.plain_explanation: 获取报价的按钮太小，位置也太靠下，颜色也不够突出。访客可能根本看不到它，或者不知道该怎么联系你们。
issues.customer_impact: 如果访客在 5 秒内找不到行动按钮，他们就会离开。优化 CTA 按钮的位置和可见性可以直接将询盘量提高 15-25%。

issues.title: Font choices and color scheme feel dated
issues.what_observed: The logo uses a mix of sans-serif and script fonts. The color palette includes a dark teal header and yellow accents, which feels a bit generic and not particularly modern.
issues.why_problem: While not broken, the design language feels like it hasn't been updated in 5-7 years. This can subconsciously signal to customers that the business is not current or innovative.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A cleaner, more modern font pairing (e.g., a strong sans-serif for headings, a readable sans-serif for body). A refined color palette that uses white space more effectively.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Update the logo slightly for a cleaner look. Use a modern sans-serif font throughout. Increase white space to make the content breathe.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站的整体设计和字体看起来有点过时，像是几年前的风格。这会让访客觉得公司不够现代或专业。
issues.customer_impact: 虽然不会直接导致流失，但过时的设计会降低品牌信任度，使潜在客户更倾向于选择看起来更专业的竞争对手。

positive_observations: The tagline 'Same house, more home' is catchy and clearly communicates the value proposition.
The contact information (phone number and address) is present in the header, which is good for local SEO.
The headline 'Bigger. Brighter. Better.' is clear and benefit-driven.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the generic stock photo with a real project image to build immediate trust.
2. Simplify the header and make the phone number/quote button the most prominent element.
3. Move the primary CTA button above the fold and increase its visual weight.
